summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hishab Nikash Pro final batch features: Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Customer Statement, Packing List, AI Chat with GPT-5.2, and daily cron scheduler. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 90% functional with minor invoice testing limitations.

integration_issues.issue: No invoices found in sales list to test Packing List and Print buttons

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication with test session token
Backend: Balance Sheet API returns assets/liabilities/equity
Backend: Cash Flow API returns operating/investing/financing activities
Backend: Customer Statement API returns transactions and balance
Backend: AI Chat API with GPT-5.2 integration working
Backend: Daily low stock check API for all companies
Backend: All existing APIs (products, inventory, settings, team)
Frontend: Balance Sheet page loads with KPI cards and statement view
Frontend: Cash Flow page loads with monthly chart and statement
Frontend: Customer Statement page loads from customer detail
Frontend: Reports Hub shows Balance Sheet and Cash Flow links (not disabled)
Frontend: Customer Detail has working Statement button
Frontend: AI Assistant chat works end-to-end with GPT-5.2
Frontend: Reports Hub navigation to Balance Sheet and Cash Flow works
